title: ctenitis acrosora
intro: Ctenitis acrosora, also known as the Acrosora fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis acrosora include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. In herbal preparations, Ctenitis acrosora is often used to create teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
